changelog:
🎵 Import Playlists from Spotify & YouTube
• Paste any public Spotify or YouTube playlist URL to import all tracks instantly
• Real album artwork resolved for every track via Spotify oEmbed API
• YouTube playlists parsed via modern InnerTube MWEB API

🎨 UI Improvements
• Sleek glassmorphic Import Playlist modal
• Dynamic thumbnail caching - art loads in real-time as tracks play
• Base64 placeholder icons for tracks without artwork

🔧 Bug Fixes
• Fixed tab navigation crash after importing playlists
• Fixed broken HTML rendering in track rows
